text_block_list.text:
Caught up preparing for an upcoming networking
event outside the academy, many students are
returning later than usual.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle, sob... I'm so, so scared...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek! N-no, no! Please don't eat me! I don't tast—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-wait... You're not a ghost...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm so sorry for yelling! Time just got away from
me while I was doing event prep.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I found myself alone in the dark and scared... I
couldn't move! But I'm so glad I'm not alone...
WHOOOOO'S THERE?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek! Wh-what now?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Hehehe. No one's here.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Buuut! That's a win for me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: T-Turbo? What do you mean by "win"?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So you were preparing for the event and fell
asleep...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but then you heard footsteps behind you and
ran away as fast as you could?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I turbo-boosted right outta there! And since
I don't hear any ghostly footsteps anymore, that
means I win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but... in movies, sometimes people think
they've gotten away when they really haven't...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
No one can keep up with me! No slowpoke ghost's
gonna catch me like a deer in some red tights!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I think she means "deer in the headlights"...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but still, walking around in the dark sure is
scary...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Really? You're scared, Rice? Then I'll go home
with ya!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: But you'll hafta keep up with me and my turbo boost!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What?!
choice_data_list: You'll be home in no time if you both run.

There might be a ghost waiting to get the jump
on you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I see... Y-yeah, you're right. The faster we leave
school, the safer I'll feel!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Youuu betcha! I'm a genius! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can you give us a starting signal? The shoe
cabinet's the finishing line! We'll sprint to that!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
WOOO! Bahahaha! This is awesome! I can hear
our footsteps echoing around!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe! And your laughter is echoing too, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
BAHAHAHA! You're right! You should try
laughing real loud too, Rice!

The footsteps and cheery voices of the two
Umamusume echo throughout the quiet school
building.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-the two of us? I suppose that would be less scary, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You'll be cursed with bad luck if you go with me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...EEEEEK?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: GAHHHHH?! What?! What is it?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I saw a figure in the window just now!
choice_data_list: Are you sure it wasn't your own shadow?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh... right... Aw, I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I'm pretty sure it's a ghost! We gotta get
outta here before it catches us!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, w-wait, Turbo! It really was just my shadow!
Slip! THUD!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
GRAAAAAH! What's a banana peel doing lying
around here?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh noooo! I'm so sorry, Turbo! You're getting hit with bad luck because you're with me!

Mayhem gives rise to more mayhem as the two
run off in a fluster.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Now that's just a mean ghost!

I explain to them that it's best for everyone to
stick together instead of running around in the
dark.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Right, I think it's riskier to run... And it shouldn't
be scary if we're all together...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Really? No running?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
...Okay! Then I'll go ahead and make sure
nothing's waiting to ambush us!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Wow, I'm so glad she's here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no. I'm the older one here! I need to step
up!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Heeey! The coast's clear! No ghosts! Hurry up!
C'moooon, let's goooo!

I leave the school building with Twin Turbo
running around, full of energy, and Rice Shower
smiling softly.
